transcript.text: You know, it's my first day.
I'm an executive assistant here at GrowthX.
So I joined GrowthX around last year, July.
So I've been here for more than a year.
But I work Pacific Time hours.
And outside of work, I'm a mom of three.
And I love, like, I'm playing some board games, listening to music.
I'm based in Miami, Florida, but I often travel to Columbia, South.
Like two, three months, and they loved it.
So one day I have to come visit for sure.
Okay, so I'm going to go ahead and share my screen, and then let me know if you can see it.
Okay, so are you able to see my screen?
So today's agenda, the agenda of this call is to take you through some of the tools that we use here in GrowthX.

Yes, and I'll also take you through our onboarding resources, and then at the end of the call, you're going to get some time to ask me any questions that you have, and I'll also tell you like a few expectations that we have on our side.
So the first thing that we're going to go through are the tools that we use, and I know that you've already started setting this up, and let me know if you need access to any of these tools.
So the first one is Slack.
We use Slack for day-to-day communication between the GrowthX team and the clients as well.
So we have two types of accounts of channels, sorry, Slack channels.
We have the internal Slack channels and the external channels.
So the internal ones are just for communication between the GrowthX team only.
And the external Slack channels are for communicating with the clients, between GrowthX and the client team.
So I'm going to show you what it looks like.
Okay, so for example, we have DX superhuman, so something like this.
So this is D, D stands for delivery.
So we have two units in GrowthX.
We have the delivery team and the build team.
So the delivery team is for the client-facing team, and build team consists of the operations, engineering, just the work behind the scenes.
So when you see D, D stands for delivery.
So it's delivery and then EXT for external.
This is an external channel between GrowthX and the clients.
And then this is the name of the client.
EXT is for external and then the client name.
So that is our naming format.
You said D was for delivery?
And then for internal Slack channels, we have D-I-N-T for internal and then the client name.
So these are the channels and we also have other channels like the general channel for the GrowthX team, ITN tools.
And you can also DM your team members, the direct messages.
Do you have any question on Slack before I proceed?
The naming breakdown was very helpful to understand.
So the next one is Geekbot.
So Geekbot, have you used Geekbot before?
So this is a software that has been integrated into Slack.
You don't have to install anything on your site, though.
So when you go into Slack, so this is what Geekbot looks like.
So day at around 9 or 10 a.m.
your time, you'll be getting a prompt for you to answer some questions, depending on which team you are in.
So right now I added you to the GTM Geekbot because you're part of the GTM team, right?
So let me show you what it looks like.
So every day you'll be getting a prompt with questions asking you, like, what are you working on today?
Do you have any updates for your team?
Stuff like that, so that your team members or your team can know, like, what you're working on.
So this is where your Gitbot updates will be going.
So when you get the prompt, Gitbot will be sending you a message.
And what you have to do is to respond to that chat.
So you respond to it with what you want to say, depending on what the question is.
And then it will automatically send your response to this channel, the GTM channel.
So, for example, Jesus, he just updated, he sent his report an hour ago.
So you can see, like, what is, so these are the questions for today.
What is not going well or slowing you down?
What are your top priorities for today?
So you have to respond to that.
And that is our, like, we have our daily standups through Gitbot.
So linear is the next tool.
And this is our project management tool.
This is where we keep track of projects.
And we also raise tickets to our engineering team.
In case there are some workflows that are not working well.
So you can just raise a linear ticket and they'll get to it.
But basically, this is where we, it's our project management tool.
This is where we keep track of our tasks and projects.
And I'll take you through linear.
And then Notion is our knowledge management platform.
So this is where we store documents.
We have our SOPs over there, our client workspaces.
And basically, it's our document, where we store all our documentation.
And then we use Loom for screen recording.
And then Zoom for meeting, then Fathom is our AI not taker.
For linear, you mentioned like ticket?
Is this like if we have an error or what does Linear do again?
So for the engineering team to keep track of what they are working on.
So there's a documentation on how to use Linear.
So I'll just give you like a brief overview.
So for example, in Slack, since Linear has also been integrated into Slack, when you type the forward slash, you will get a prompt or a pop-up, create new issue for Linear.
So when you click on that, you can raise a ticket to whatever team you want, like the EPD.
So EPD is for the engineering and product team.
So you can raise to the engineering team and then say what your issue is.
You can describe what error you're running into.
You can assign it to a specific person.
So yeah, so most, mostly the delivery team that you.
Uses this in case there's an error in their workflows, so they raise it to the engineering team.
But then for the rest of us, like myself, I just use it to keep track of my tasks and my projects.
So I'll take you through the onboarding documentation, and we'll start with the ones in Notion.
So like I said, Notion is where we keep all our documentation, all our processes.
So when you log into Notion, on the left-hand side, after the growthx icon, you'll see the search, the search icon.
So you can search for the handbook.
So when you search for the handbook, just scroll a bit, and then you'll see the onboarding section, and then click on onboarding resources, and then the first option, company-wide onboarding.
Do I need to make a copy or just kind of go through it?
No, you don't need to do anything.
So we've divided your onboarding tasks into two main sections.
So day one, which is today, it's basically about getting set up on your tools, like setting up your tools and accounts, and also meeting some team members, maybe.
So like you set up your one password, your Slack, Notion, Zoom, et cetera.
So that's what you're going to be working on today.
And also maybe meet some few members and then learning about our expectations.
And then for the entire week, which is your week one, you'll meet with your manager if you don't meet with him today.
So first of all, your manager is Bridget.
I met Bridget in the interview process, but no.
And you have a call with her.
So you have a call with Bridget tomorrow.
And then your onboarding buddy is Tyler.

So your onboarding buddy is someone besides your manager that you can reach out to in case you have any questions or someone that will take you through the onboarding process just to make you catch up quickly and to learn about our processes, how we work, and stuff like that.
And then you'll also have a bunch of items to read, like the big picture, how we work.
So these are articles that Marcel, our CEO, put together over time just to let you know about like our company history, our working model, et cetera.
And then you'll watch some videos and read some articles like the time of policy, code of conduct, and I'll take you through this just briefly, but you'll read them later on when you have time.
And then you have some meetings.
So this is the first meeting and then you have two more.
So you have a call with Marcel on Wednesday.
And you have a call with Kyle on Friday, but let me just confirm.
Yeah, so you have a call with Marcel on Wednesday and then Kyle on Friday.
So those are the two remaining calls.
So what we did is this same documentation just to make it easier for you to keep track of what you're supposed to be working on.
We just duplicated that in linear.
But then your case is different.
So I took the normal company onboarding project, but then I asked Tyler because Tyler is on the sales team and it's only him for now.
So you're the only addition for now.
So I asked him to add some materials that could help you.
So I was in the process of...
Assigning this project to you, and I can do that right now.
Did you set up your linear account?
Yeah, I can see you here.
Yeah, you can just set it up, and then I can assign it to you.
And I should be able to log in with my email.
There's a link that was sent together with the GrowthX welcome email.
Yeah, the welcome email that you got.
It has an invitation link to linear.
And then you're there, okay, yeah, got it.
Showing it now, one can, Google.
Do you mind sharing your screen, please?
Is it asking you to quit Zoom so that you can be doing?
No, I just don't know which window it's going to share.
Yeah, I'm going have to leave and come back.
Yeah, I can see it now.
Okay, so you can join the onboarding team.
You can set that up later.
So, when you, under workspace, click on project.
And then I'll have to add.
Due to this project, let me try doing that now.
So when you click on projects, okay, let me share my screen again.
So when you click on projects here, you'll see all projects and my projects.
So you have to click on your projects here, my projects.
And then you'll see all the projects that have been assigned to you.
But then at the top, click on issues.
So we have projects and we have issues.
So projects are the like, yeah, like a big task that you have to work on that has some small tasks or small steps.
So the issues are the small tasks, you know.
So these are the tasks that you're supposed to work on.
We have the blue and the red tags right here to show you like when you're supposed to do this or to work on what.
So the blue ones for the day ones, these are what you're supposed to focus on today.
And then week one, within the week, this is what you're supposed to do.
And it's not like a fixed deadline.
If it's too much, it's okay.
So I can say like you can just work with Tyler and yeah.
So besides the task, you'll see the dotted circles.
So you can just mark it as you're working on it.
So to do backlog is you haven't started working on it.
To do is something that you plan to work on.
In progress, you've started working on it, but it's not yet complete.
In review, that doesn't apply here.
And then done when it's completed.
So what you have to do is click on that task.
And then since everything is stored in Notion, like all the documentation is in Notion, you'll find the link to that task.
So you will find a link and then you just click on it and then it will take you to where you're supposed to go and read or whatever you're supposed to do.
So for example, this task says fill out your bio in team directory.
So what you have to do is come here, just scroll, scroll to the bottom and then new page, just add your picture and all the details about yourself.
So fill out as much as you can and then save so that you can see or know more about you.
So when you're done, just come back here and then mark it as done and then go to the next one.
So these are for the tasks, but then on the right side, the properties, these are for the entire project.
So when you're done with it, you just have to mark it as completed here.
Yeah, and you can see priority level, who's the lead, which is yourself, any other members that need to know what you're working on.
And then next, I'll take you through just a few expectations that we have.
And the first one is at least four hours of overlap with Pacific Time.
And this is because most of us are located in different locations, you know, like we're located in different locations.
And so we are in different time zones.
But then, so growthx, we require at least four hours of overlap with Pacific Time.
But I guess this doesn't apply to you.
I mean, I'm not in Pacific.
It's not as much as you are, but I'm three hours shifted.
Yeah, Eastern, but that's still at the end of my...
So the other expectation is daily Geekbot updates, and yeah, the stand-ups are mandatory for everyone.
Oh, okay, just like, you know, typing in and, okay, cool.
Yeah, so that's mandatory and it's daily.
So every day you have to, like, let the team know, like, what you're working on.
And it's good to do the Geekbot as soon as I log in, you think?
Like, is that typically what people do?
Yeah, but I can say whatever works for you.
Yeah, it's better when you start your shift.
You don't have to do it any other earlier time or when you get it because it's going to send it maybe earlier than when you start your shift.
So when you start your shift, that is when you can just respond.
But anything that works for you within your shift.
The first one is the time-off policy.
You're going to go through this later on.
So in GrowthX, we have unlimited PTO, and we don't require any approval for your time-offs.
So you're free to take any time-offs for your national holidays or vacation time.
What you have to do is come to your calendar and then just put a block in advance and then add your team.
So you can just, for example, Ismail, he's going to be out of office from January 12th to Feb 2nd.
So Ismail out of office waiting.
Like, just put a block and then add your team and that's it.
So you're going to add the GTM team, if that's clear.
So yeah, you just have to make sure that you give like enough notice, unless it's an emergency.
So you just add it to your calendar and add your team numbers.
So the next one is employee referral program.
So anytime you refer someone to GrowthX, you'll get paid.
And they tell their heads that for engineering roles, you'll get up to 10K USD.
And for non-engineering roles, you'll get up to 5K USD, as long as that person gets to stay in GrowthX up to six months to make sure that they're the right fit.
And then just a heads up about this Slack channel, it's called BITN tools.
So when you get into Slack, you can just search for ITN tools, it will pop up.
So this is where you can, this is your go-to channel in case you have any issues with access to any tools.
So if you need access to any tools, so this is where you can just come.
And you can see either myself, me, or Yusuf.
So Yusuf is our head of cybersecurity and IT.
So you can just come here, say whatever you need, and then CC myself or Yusuf.
And then we have bi-weekly all-hands.
And the next one is, let me check.
Just prepare yourself because you're going to introduce yourself to the company, the team members.
And just, you can just say.
Like your name, what you're based, and any fun facts about yourself, or what you enjoy doing outside of work.
Can you see the invite on your calendar, though?
So, lastly, we have this email, tim at growthxlabs.com.
And this is what we use to access most tools, because most tools are shared.
But this is what we use to log into the, to most tools.
And I can help you set it up right now, if you don't mind sharing the screen.
What, um, which tool should I start?
No, I can just help you to log into this.
And then at the right side where you can see your profile and the growthx icon, just click on that and then add an account.
But then you should have set up your 1Password.
you have the 1Password already set up?
So, but I can't see your, did it go to another tab because I can just see your welcome to growthx.me.
Oh, yeah, you can't see this.
I think I need to put in the TeamX team.
No, growthxlabs, labs.com, labs.com, yeah, and then next, click on next.
Yeah, so when you reach this point, you'll have to open the 1Password extension.
Yeah, yeah, yeah, I see it.
I can't see it on my side, though, so I don't know how to direct you.
Okay, maybe you can talk me through it.
I'm not sure what I should be looking so if can see it, so you can see the team at growthxlabs.com.
So when you click on that on the right side, you should be able to see the password.
So you can just copy and paste it here.
So for me, I don't have...
I only have my one password, I don't see other passwords, maybe let me try to click around.
Let me check if I added, I added you to that.
Yeah, you should be able to see it.
Then, do you mind sharing your entire screen?
Because I can see, like, what's really happening.
So let's go to the other tab where you are logging in.
I think it's the second tab, yeah.
So open your one password extension, the one at the top.
Do you see the one password icon at the top?
So you need to click on that dropdown.
Can you click on that dropdown at the top?
Should I maybe try to log out, uninstall it?
Because you already have access, it's just that it opened the employee vault instead of the internal team.
So we need to go and select.
All teams or internal teams for you to be able to see the credentials.
Can you see my, there it was.
But I can see a screen, though.
Maybe if somebody else gets stuck, just tell them to refresh their browser.
Like, it's like an update button right here on the side.
So, click on the fast option, the team Jimmy.
So that is the image that you'll be using to access most of the shared tools and also for communication between our team and the clients.
And that is also where the clients, like if the clients need to share access to their own systems, so this is the email that they add instead of individual emails.
Yeah, so just a reminder for you to watch the onboarding camp recordings, especially the ones from Marcel, so that you can go into the meeting with him with questions.
Okay, and that's it from me.
Do you have any questions, any issues, any concerns?
Anything you need to help with?
No, I just saw in the team calendar, there's a weekly sync with Strappy.
guess they're one of our clients.
I actually used to work for Strappy last year.
So it's just funny to see that.
If you don't have any questions, then I'm so excited to get working with you.
And so nice to meet you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Nigel Hammett to GrowthX tools, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding is managed in Linear.** The "Account Executive Onboarding" project contains all tasks, with links to Notion for documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [**Daily standups are asynchronous via Geekbot.** Respond to the Slack prompt at the start of your shift to update the team on priorities and blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Use the `team@growthxlabs.com` email for shared tools.** This is the central login for most platforms and the address clients use to grant system access.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [**Key meetings are scheduled this week.** Meet manager Bridget and buddy Tyler tomorrow, CEO Marcel on Wednesday, and Kyle on Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Process & Tools

  - [**Linear (Project Management):**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Manages onboarding tasks via the "Account Executive Onboarding" project.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Complete an "issue" → mark "Done" in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Issue Statuses:** Backlog, To Do, In Progress, Done.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Tickets:** Use the `/linear create` Slack command to report engineering issues.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**Notion (Knowledge Base):**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [Central hub for all documentation, SOPs, and client workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [Onboarding tasks link directly to relevant Notion pages.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [**Slack (Communication):**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [Primary tool for internal and client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [**Channel Naming:** `D-EXT-[ClientName]` for external/delivery; `D-INT-[ClientName]` for internal/delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Geekbot (Asynchronous Standups):**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [Slack-integrated bot for daily standups, replacing live meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Process:** Respond to the prompt at the start of your shift → updates post to the GTM channel.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**Other Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [**Loom:** Screen recording.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [**Zoom:** Meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [**Fathom:** AI note-taker.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Company Expectations & Policies

  - [**Time Zone Overlap:** 4-hour minimum with Pacific Time (PT).](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Daily Geekbot:** Mandatory for all team members.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Time Off (PTO):** Unlimited, no approval needed.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Process:** Block calendar with "OOO" event → invite your team (GTM).](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Employee Referral Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Bonus:** Up to $10k (engineering) or $5k (non-engineering).](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Condition:** Referral must remain employed for 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - **IT Support:** Use the `#ITN-tools` Slack channel for access issues, CC'ing Alice or Yusuf.
  - [**Bi-Weekly All-Hands:** Next meeting is tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [**Action:** Prepare a brief self-introduction (name, location, fun fact).](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

### Account Setup: `team@growthxlabs.com`

  - [This shared email is the central login for most tools and the address clients use to grant system access.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [**Troubleshooting:** A 1Password extension issue was resolved by refreshing the browser, which forced it to load the correct "Internal Team" vault.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nigel:**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Complete Day 1 onboarding tasks in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [Prepare self-introduction for tomorrow's all-hands meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
      - [Watch onboarding recordings (especially Marcel's) before Wednesday's call.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [**Alice:**](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
      - [Confirm Nigel's access to all required tools.](https://fathom.video/share/1HLGdxBChSQxw_LmovyqkpKc9YKsXpBo?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)

action_items.description: Complete Day 1 onboarding in Linear; then Week 1
Watch Marcel's onboarding camp recordings before Wed call w/ Marcel
